one_time_description: Loss on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: COVID-19 impacted operations including housing repairs, staff training, travel reduction, office closures, cancelled events. First Nation received additional government assistance for pandemic response. Cowessess Ventures Limited Partnership operates in agriculture/business with revenue of $7,727,520 and net loss of $313,265.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 not 2024 - document is for year ended March 31, 2021. Nine entities consolidated including CMHC Housing Projects, Last Oak Golf & Country Club, Cowessess Mall, Crooked Lake Homes Ltd., Crooked Lake Homes Limited Partnership, Cowessess Development Account, Little Child Community Development Board Inc., and Cowessess Flood Claim Holdings Inc. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Cowessess Ventures Limited Partnership and Cowessess Ventures Ltd. Several trusts excluded from consolidation (Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, Band Development Culture and Recreation Education and Agriculture Trust, Flood Claim Trust). Non-co-terminous year ends for several subsidiaries (November 30, 2020 and December 31, 2020). Project management cash of $3,036,970 and CMHC reserves of $340,612 included in restricted cash. TLE payable of $711,684 included in accounts payable. Budget figures also provided in statement of operations.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
